series_metadata.series_description: Files concerning the ownership and maintenance of Ohio Attorney General vehicles. Records include, but are not limited to, service records, compilation sheets, operation maintenance reports of licensed vehicles, warranty and guaranty statements, operating manuals, reports and work orders, accident reports, repair records, and mileage and usage logs.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years if concerning maintenance, service, expired registration, or usage log records. All other documents, such as the title and current registration, should be retained until vehicle is salvaged or sold, then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 2 years if concerning maintenance, service, expired registration, or usage log records. All other documents, such as the title and current registration, should be retained until vehicle is salvaged or sold, then destroy. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
